title: Take over dashboard connections from board templates

posts.author: Jason.Cole (Jason Coleman)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be very helpful if You could implement that:
when I create a new board from a template the new board should also take over the connections to dashboard, so that you don’t have to manually add your boards. Imagine you have 100 new bards per day all have to be connected to a dashboard…
